---
title: "City of Albuquerque Annual Cost of Service Study and Rate Setting"
number: 3
image: /images/project5-albuq.png
---
{{< include _return-to-pf.qmd >}}

::: {.article}
![](/images/project5-albuq.png){.left-img}

Bell & Associates has assisted the City of Albuquerque’s Solid Waste Management Department with calculating the cost of service rates for the City’s 180,000 residential and 11,000 commercial customers, transfer facilities, Clean City programs, and the Cerro Colorado Landfill since 2009. The process coincides with the annual budget review and provides the Solid Waste Department with the means to present program changes and rate adjustments for the upcoming fiscal year to the City Council. Over the last seven years, Mr. Bell has completed the financial review and cost modeling of the current system and projected future costs of collection, disposal rates, and service fees for the diverse services provided by the City. 
:::
